translations.it: La vasca da bagno è ancora bagnata.
translations.ja: 浴槽はまだ濡れています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'baignoire'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.

sentences.target: Je remplis la baignoire pour les enfants.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɑ̃.pli la bɛ.ɲwaʁ puʁ le zɑ̃.fɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je remplis la baignoire pour les enfants.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɑ̃.pli la bɛ.ɲwaʁ puʁ le zɑ̃.fɑ̃/
translations.en: I'm filling the bathtub for the kids.
translations.es: Estoy llenando la bañera para los niños.
translations.de: Ich fülle die Badewanne für die Kinder.
translations.it: Sto riempiendo la vasca da bagno per i bambini.
translations.ko: 아이들을 위해 욕조에 물을 채우고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在给孩子们放洗澡水。
translations.yue: 我而家為啲小朋友喺浴缸度放水。
translations.pt: Estou enchendo a banheira para as crianças.
translations.he: אני ממלא את האמבטיה עבור הילדים.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đổ nước vào bồn tắm cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Ik vul het bad voor de kinderen.
translations.hi: मैं बच्चों के लिए बाथटब भर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Γεμίζω την μπανιέρα για τα παιδιά.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengisi bak mandi untuk anak-anak.
translations.ja: 子どもたちのために浴槽に水を入れています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb (present 1st singular), transitive, taking 'la baignoire' as object.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'baignoire'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'remplis'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, plural, introducing 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On a débouché la baignoire ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a de.bu.ʃe la bɛ.ɲwaʁ sə ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: On a débouché la baignoire ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a de.bu.ʃe la bɛ.ɲwaʁ sə ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: We unclogged the bathtub this morning.
translations.de: Heute Morgen haben wir die Badewanne entstopft.
translations.it: Stamattina abbiamo sturato la vasca da bagno.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침에 욕조가 막힌 것을 뚫었어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上我们把浴缸疏通了。
translations.ru: Сегодня утром мы прочистили засор в ванне.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã desentupimos a banheira.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi đã thông bồn tắm.
translations.ar: قمنا بفك انسداد حوض الاستحمام هذا الصباح.
translations.nl: Vanmorgen hebben we het bad ontstopd.
translations.hu: Ma reggel kitisztítottuk a kád lefolyóját.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हमने बाथटब का जाम खोल दिया.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί ξεβουλώσαμε την μπανιέρα.
translations.nb: I morges renset vi avløpet i badekaret.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami membuka sumbatan bak mandi.
translations.sv: I morse rensade vi avloppet i badkaret.
translations.ro: În această dimineață am desfundat cada.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno jsme pročistili odtok ve vaně.
translations.da: I morges rensede vi afløbet i badekarret.
translations.ja: 今朝、浴槽の詰まりを直しました。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun meaning 'we/people'.
Auxiliary (present 3rd singular) forming the passé composé.
Past participle; main verb in compound past with 'avoir'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'baignoire'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'débouché'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'matin'.
Common noun; temporal complement (with 'ce').

sentences.target: Tes shampoings traînent dans la baignoire.

translations.fr: Tes shampoings traînent dans la baignoire.
translations.en: Your shampoos are lying around in the bathtub.
translations.es: Tus champús están tirados en la bañera.
translations.de: Deine Shampoos liegen in der Badewanne herum.
translations.it: I tuoi shampoo sono sparsi nella vasca da bagno.
translations.ko: 네 샴푸들이 욕조에 여기저기 널브러져 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的洗发水都散落在浴缸里。
translations.yue: 你啲洗頭水樽喺浴缸入面亂咁擺。
translations.pt: Seus shampoos estão espalhados na banheira.
translations.vi: Dầu gội của bạn vương vãi khắp trong bồn tắm.
translations.ar: عبوات الشامبو الخاصة بك مبعثرة في حوض الاستحمام.
translations.nl: Jouw shampoos liggen overal in het bad.
translations.hu: A samponjaid szanaszét hevernek a kádban.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे शैम्पू बाथटब में इधर-उधर पड़े हैं.
translations.pl: Twoje szampony walają się w wannie.
translations.el: Τα σαμπουάν σου είναι πεταμένα στην μπανιέρα.
translations.nb: Sjampoene dine ligger og slenger i badekaret.
translations.id: Sampo-sampo kamu berantakan di bak mandi.
translations.sv: Dina schampon ligger och skräpar i badkaret.
translations.ro: Șampoanele tale sunt împrăștiate în cadă.
translations.cs: Tvoje šampony se povalují ve vaně.
translations.da: Dine shampooer ligger og flyder i badekarret.
translations.ja: あなたのシャンプーが浴槽の中に散らかっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, plural form agreeing with 'shampoings'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb (present 3rd plural), intransitive; describes current state of the subject.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'baignoire'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
